description: Each attack fires additional arrows at nearby enemies. When fewer extra targets are in range, the surplus shots strike the primary target instead.
tooltipTemplate: Each attack fires {extraShots} extra arrows at distinct in-range enemies for {secondaryDamageMultiplier%} damage. Excess shots fall back to the primary target.

description: Arrows tear through enemies along the entire shot line, dealing reduced damage to anyone caught in the path.
tooltipTemplate: Arrows pierce through enemies along the full shot line (out to attack range), hitting up to {maxSecondaryTargets} extra enemies for {secondaryDamageMultiplier%} damage each.

description: Attacks brand the target with Hunter's Mark, granting all attackers increased crit chance against marked enemies. Multiple Marksmen stack the mark with diminishing returns.
tooltipTemplate: Attacks apply Hunter's Mark for {durationSeconds:1}s. Marked enemies grant +{critChanceBonus%} crit chance to all attackers; each additional source adds +{additionalStackBonus%}. Stacks up to {maxStacks}× from distinct attackers.
